item.title: Chithresh T M
item.description:
Chithresh T M is a Research Scholar in the MAVENs Group at the Department of Physics and Nanotechnology, SRMIST, KTR. His research focuses on computational investigation of quantum materials, particularly evaluating and optimizing spin coherence time (T₂) for qubit applications.

He employs density functional theory (DFT) and density functional perturbation theory (DFPT) to analyze electronic and vibrational properties that impact T₂. His work targets materials with enhanced quantum coherence for quantum technology applications.
